tags.inscription:
At this place on August 17, 1942, Italian fascists brutally killed father Ljubo Vodopija (born 1893), mother Eva (born 1895), and their sons Dragul (born 1921) and Baro (born 1923).

The land of Žut embraced them like a mother, and they found eternal rest
